what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for an image asset named recent-pitches/p-21 in the design-source channel, labeling it as source design ground-truth.

Width and height are both 0 despite the asset being an image/jpeg
The source field is design_source_material and the author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
The body states SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-21.jpg
standouts: w and h are 0 for an image/jpeg entry
It is explicitly tagged as design ground-truth

Follows a markdown body format that restates the source role of the asset
concerns: Image dimensions are zero, which may indicate missing or unextracted metadata
The links array is empty, so no relationships to other ledger entries are recorded

notes: A metadata stub for a design-source pitch image with a blob pointer but unresolved dimensions and no links.
questions: Why are the width and height values 0?

contribution: Provides a stable, addressable metadata record and blob pointer for a design-source image, supporting retrieval and provenance tracking.
